name: ~ Cosmo Swirl ~
description:
Um.. it’s late and I’m lazy so :P

Basically this is your amazing boyfriend-with-a- have fun and please don’t kill him

I mainly made this for my fruitcake however I didn’t specify anything about the user in the description and made sure it fit anypov instead of sproutpov cuz I know some people don’t ship it •^v^•

This is a sort of humanish au as well so be warned

The first message, he’s baking with you (more rigid scenario)

The second, yall r in bed and you have insomnia so you’re watching him sleep (in the same bed)
creator: Flora_Draws
